subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Behold what the All-Merciful hath revealed in the Qur'án concerning the Day when mankind shall stand before the Lord of the worlds. He hath heralded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ان انظر ما انزله الرحمن فی الفرقان یوم یقوم الناس لرب العالمین قد بشر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment
